message:
🐛 Fix stacks disappearing on page reload (stale-while-revalidate) (#665)

On browser reload, useStackDiscovery would wipe cached stacks during
the non-silent refetch when the cache was expired (>5 min TTL):

1. Stacks initialized from localStorage cache (shows data)
2. Cache expired → refetch(silent=false) called
3. setStacks([]) wiped visible stacks, showing empty state
4. Eventually fresh data arrives, but gap is visible

Fix: implement proper stale-while-revalidate — always show cached
stacks (even if stale) while fetching fresh data in the background.
Only show loading spinner when there's truly no data to display.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
